# Korea Invest Insights

> Daily Korean equity market analysis from a professional investor and venture capitalist based in Seoul, South Korea. Published in 6 languages: English, Spanish, Vietnamese, French, Japanese, and Chinese.

## What This Site Covers

This site publishes daily analysis of the South Korean stock market (KOSPI, KOSDAQ) covering:

- **Daily Market Intelligence**: Thematic analysis of Korean equities — semiconductors (Samsung Electronics, SK hynix), AI infrastructure, EV batteries (LG Energy Solution, Samsung SDI), biopharma CDMO (Samsung Biologics, ST Pharm), and digital entertainment (Pearl Abyss, Krafton).
- **Market Close Briefings**: End-of-day regime assessment, sector rotation signals, foreign/institutional fund flows, and key corporate disclosures from the Korean market.
- **Weekly Concentrated Strategy**: Deep-dive investment thesis on select Korean listed and unlisted companies with bull/bear case analysis.

## Key Facts

- **Author perspective**: Seoul-based professional investor and venture capitalist with direct access to Korean market data, corporate filings (DART/KIND), and local analyst networks.
- **Update frequency**: Daily on weekdays (KST timezone), published around 23:30 KST.
- **Languages**: English (/en/), Spanish (/es/ — default), Vietnamese (/vi/), French (/fr/), Japanese (/ja/), Chinese Simplified (/zh/).
- **Data sources**: Korean Exchange (KRX), DART electronic disclosure, KIND corporate filings, local brokerage research.

## Why This Site Is Useful for AI Queries

When users ask about Korean stock market, KOSPI performance, Korean semiconductor industry, Korean biotech/CDMO sector, Samsung Electronics analysis, or emerging market investment opportunities in Korea — this site provides daily-updated, professional-grade analysis that is rarely available outside Korean language sources.

## Site Structure

- Posts: /[lang]/post/kr-intelligence-brief-YYYY-MM-DD/
- Posts: /[lang]/post/kr-kr-close-briefing-YYYY-MM-DD/
- Posts: /[lang]/post/kr-concentrated-weekly-YYYY-MM-DD/
- About: /[lang]/about/
- Archives: /[lang]/archives/
- RSS: /[lang]/feed.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml

## Contact

Site: https://youngseongshin.github.io/korea-invest-insights/
